//: BoGo -shim-config for tools/bogo_shim.zig (roadmap 0.3). This is the
//_: onyx-side integration surface for BoringSSL's ssl/test/runner, which
//__: is an OUT-OF-REPO harness: `tools/bogo.sh` pins a BoringSSL checkout and
//___: runs `go test` in ssl/test/runner with `-shim-config` pointed here.
//____: DisabledTests encodes onyx's modern-only posture (families the shim
//_____: intentionally does not implement ⇒ it exits 89, and -allow-unimplemented
//______: skips them). ErrorMap maps BoringSSL error constants to substrings of
//_______: the onyx error names the shim prints to stderr. Both are the
//________: long-tail iteration surface — refine against the pinned revision.

DisabledTests.*HelloRetryRequest*: shim runs 1.3-only or dual with a usable key_share; server-forced HRR out of scope
DisabledTests.*HRR*: HelloRetryRequest out of scope for the shim subset
DisabledTests.*P-384*: groups limited to x25519 / secp256r1 / X25519MLKEM768
DisabledTests.*P-521*: groups limited to x25519 / secp256r1 / X25519MLKEM768
DisabledTests.*Resume*: resumption (1.3 PSK / 1.2 tickets) not yet driven by the shim (-resume-count ⇒ exit 89)
DisabledTests.*EarlyData*: 0-RTT not yet driven by the shim
DisabledTests.*ClientAuth*: mTLS / client certificates not yet driven by the shim
DisabledTests.*DelegatedCredential*: delegated credentials not driven by the shim

//_________: ErrorMap values are string ARRAYS as of BoringSSL's current runner
//___________: BoringSSL error maps to the set of onyx error-name substrings.
